name: Chili Pepper Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly grease a 10-inch pizza pan.
2. Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a saucepan.
3. Add onion, garlic, tomato paste, tomatoes with juice, and oregano to the saucepan.
4. Stir well to break up tomatoes, then simmer uncovered for 10-15 minutes or until thickened; cool.
5. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
6. In a bowl, mix together flour, salt, and yeast.
7. Add water and mix to form a dough. Knead the dough well.
8. Roll out the dough into a 10-inch circle.
9. Place the greased pizza pan on a baking sheet.
10. Brush the surface of the dough with some remaining oil and cover with the tomato mixture.
11. Drain and chop the green chilies, then sprinkle them on top.
12. Sprinkle cheese over the chili peppers and drizzle with remaining oil.
13. Bake in the preheated oven for 25 minutes.
14. Top the pizza with pepperoni and olives.
15. Bake for an additional 10 minutes.
16. Cut into wedges, garnish with tomato roses and parsley sprigs if desired, and serve hot.
